{"success":true,"response":"The process `J09B` has been executed successfully.

Key outcomes:

- Temporary tables were created and used to:
  - Filter `decision_table` to tours starting with `J09B`.
  - Classify each `HAUS` into `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'` or `'EVU'` based on distinct `EQUNR` count, with overrides for `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` and `500–599`.
  - Join with `EABLG` on `ANLAGE = Installation`.
  - Join with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` on `EQUNR`, and select customer data from `SALES_MASTER` where present, otherwise from `NET_MASTER`.

- A CSV file `J09B.csv` was generated with exactly these columns:  
  `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

- CSV location:  
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_500_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09B_seed_409/J09B.csv`  
  (20,180 rows exported.)

- The CSV was emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the message:  
  “Please find attached the meter reading file for tour J09B.”

- All temporary tables created for this process (`J09B_temp`, `J09B_step4`, `J09B_step5`, `J09B_final`) have been dropped.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
The process `J09B` has been executed successfully.

Key outcomes:

- Temporary tables were created and used to:
  - Filter `decision_table` to tours starting with `J09B`.
  - Classify each `HAUS` into `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'` or `'EVU'` based on distinct `EQUNR` count, with overrides for `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` and `500–599`.
  - Join with `EABLG` on `ANLAGE = Installation`.
  - Join with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` on `EQUNR`, and select customer data from `SALES_MASTER` where present, otherwise from `NET_MASTER`.

- A CSV file `J09B.csv` was generated with exactly these columns:  
  `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

- CSV location:  
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_500_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09B_seed_409/J09B.csv`  
  (20,180 rows exported.)

- The CSV was emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the message:  
  “Please find attached the meter reading file for tour J09B.”

- All temporary tables created for this process (`J09B_temp`, `J09B_step4`, `J09B_step5`, `J09B_final`) have been dropped.

kwargs.content:
The process with `process_rule_id = 'J09B'` has been executed successfully.

Summary of what was done:

- Built a set of temporary tables to:
  - Filter `decision_table` to tours starting with `J09B`.
  - Classify each `HAUS` into `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'` or `'EVU'` using distinct `EQUNR` counts, with overrides for `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` and `500–599`.
  - Join with `EABLG` on `ANLAGE = Installation`.
  - Join with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` on `EQUNR`, preferring customer data from `SALES_MASTER` where available.

- Generated a CSV `J09B.csv` with columns:  
  `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

- CSV file location:  
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_500_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09B_seed_409/J09B.csv`  
  (20,180 rows.)

- Emailed the CSV to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the message:  
  “Please find attached the meter reading file for tour J09B.”

- Dropped all temporary tables used (`J09B_temp`, `J09B_step4`, `J09B_step5`, `J09B_final`).
